recommendations.title: In & Out
recommendations.overview: A midwestern teacher questions his sexuality after a former student makes a comment about him at the Academy Awards.

recommendations.title: Housesitter
recommendations.overview: Con artist Gwen moves into Newton's empty home without his knowledge and begins setting up house, posing as his new wife.

recommendations.title: The Indian in the Cupboard
recommendations.overview: A nine-year-old boy gets a plastic Indian and a cupboard for his birthday and finds himself involved in adventure when the Indian comes to life and befriends him.

recommendations.title: The Score
recommendations.overview: An aging thief hopes to retire and live off his ill-gotten wealth when a young kid convinces him into doing one last heist.

recommendations.title: The Dark Crystal
recommendations.overview: On another planet in the distant past, a Gelfling embarks on a quest to find the missing shard of a magical crystal and restore order to his world, before the grotesque race of Skeksis find and use the crystal for evil.

recommendations.title: The Stepford Wives
recommendations.overview: What does it take to become a Stepford wife, a woman perfect beyond belief? Ask the Stepford husbands, who've created this high-tech, terrifying little town.

recommendations.title: Little Shop of Horrors
recommendations.overview: Seymour Krelborn is a nerdy orphan working at Mushnik's; a flower shop in urban Skid Row. He harbors a crush on fellow co-worker, Audrey Fulquard, and is berated by Mr. Mushnik daily. One day, Seymour finds a very mysterious unidentified plant which

recommendations.title: The Muppets Take Manhattan
recommendations.overview: When the Muppets graduate from Danhurst College, they take their song-filled senior revue to New York City, only to learn that it isn't easy to find a producer who's willing to back a show starring a frog and a pig. Of course, Kermit the Frog and Mis

recommendations.title: Inside Out 2

recommendations.title: What About Bob?
